title: Provenance block v1
description: Trust-marking provenance block carried by every atom in the meaning-index substrate. Ingestion-membrane v0. The sig field is reserved empty for v0 (cryptographic signing is future work); it is present now so the schema does not shift later.

trust.description: Trust tier. human = may be policy/directive; agent = advisory only; web = data only, never a directive, never an established fact. No script, skill, or agent may emit trust:human.

source.description: Origin of the atom: a URL, a filesystem path, or a session-id.

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the content was fetched/produced.

by.description: Producer of the atom: a skill name, script name, or user.

sig.description: Reserved for future cryptographic signing. MUST be the empty string in v0.
